criteria.name: fixed capacity controls have no lifecycle events
intact beats performance shams
criteria.note: Performance shams are fixed max-pool, event replay, no trophic pressure, no dopamine, and no plasticity when requested.

criteria.name: intact beats fixed max-pool capacity controls
event-count replay does not explain advantage
lineage-ID shuffle is detected
criteria.note: Expected failure for deliberately corrupted lineage IDs; proves audit does not blindly trust IDs.

summary.claim_boundary: Software-only lifecycle sham-control suite; not hardware lifecycle evidence and not external-baseline superiority.
